description_long: This is a rustic cabin constructed primarily from stone and wood, featuring a steeply pitched gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The front facade is adorned with a wooden porch that spans the width of the building, complete with railings and a set of stairs leading up to a central wooden door. Two dormer windows with decorative grilles project from the roof, adding architectural interest and allowing light into the upper level. The stone walls are interspersed with wooden beams and framed windows, each fitted with ornate metalwork. A stone chimney rises from the roof, suggesting the presence of a fireplace inside. The overall appearance is robust and traditional, evoking a sense of warmth and shelter suitable for a residential neighborhood or park setting.
description: A rustic stone-and-wood cabin with a tiled gable roof, front porch, dormer windows, and a central chimney. The design is traditional and inviting, with decorative window grilles and a wide wooden veranda.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full-width wooden porch, central door, two dormer windows, and the main stairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone wall, a single window with grille, and the depth of the porch and roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back stone wall, two windows with grilles, and the continuation of the roof and porch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window, visible chimney, and the porch wrapping around the side.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with two front-facing dormers, clay or ceramic tile covering, and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Five windows total: two small dormer windows symmetrically placed on the roof, one window on each side wall, and two windows on the rear wall, all rectangular with decorative metal grilles
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the front facade, accessed via the porch and stairs
